titleStmt.title: SII 18.214: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 214. (B.K. No. 33 of 1932-33.) DĒVĪHOSŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab in the temple of Banaśaṅkari.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 27th year of the reign of Siṁgaṇadēva, Jaya, Śrāvaṇa śu. 2, Sunday, Saṁkramaṇa. In the cyclic year Jaya there were two Śrāvaṇas and in neither did śu. 2 fall on Sunday nor was there any saṁkramaṇa. But in the previous year Vijaya, Śrāvaṇa śu. 2 did fall on Sunday though there was no saṁkramaṇa on that day. In Vijaya, the details work out correctly to A.D. 1233, July 10, Sunday.

It records a gift of taxes made to the one-thousand Mahājanas and Mummuridaṇḍas of anādiyagrahāra Dēviya-Hosavūr. A certain Gōvindadēva and Lakumaṇa are mentioned. The latter is stated to be the Suṁkavergaḍe of the governor of Bāsavūr One-hundred-and-forty.
The inscription is broken and damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīma
tu yūdavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpacakravartti
siṁgaṇadēvavarṣa 27neya jayasaṁvatsarada śrā
sudda 2 yādivāra byatīpāta saṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu
nvayanappa dēvarasaruṁ svasti śrīmanmahā
rāyanāyakajīvarakhkha gajasiṁha
dēvaṁgēriya nelevīḍinoḷu bāsavūra nūṟana
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdāḷuttamiralātana
suṁkaverggaḍe lakumaṇa lāyidēvanu
śrīmadanādiyagrahāraṁ dēviyaho
mahājana muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷige koṭṭa
kkalu mayideṟe Ettukatte kōṇa Aṁgaḍiga
vasāsirvvaru muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu
laseya gōviṁdadēvanu gaḷatigeya
ṟēśvaradēvara muṁde hoḍeda śāsana
ru 12 gavaṟēśvara
rasa The continuation is
Digital edition of SII 18.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
